110 _39GA SPHNCTR_BLADR_ADMSN_CD (39Ga) Sphincter Control - Bladder: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the level of assistance needed for the patient's bladder management at admission. Bladder management - level of assistance includes the safe use of equipment or agents
